guide:
**Quest Name:** Level 30 Side Quests
**Level:** Level 30
**Class:** All/All
**NPC:** varies, see below
**Location:** varies, see below

> ⚠️ **Note:** If you belong to **Group 1** (Good Races, lvl 30) you must do Quests 1, 3 & 4. If you belong to **Group 5** (Evil Races, lvl 30) you must do Quests 2 & 5.

---

## 🟢 Quest 1: Trails End Side Quest
**Zone:** Trails End
**NPC:** Two-eyed Jack

1. **Talk to Two-eyed Jack** in Trails End. From HP, go out the **South Gate**, follow road south, in south part of Trails End find small village, Jack is in one of the buildings.

2. **Jack** sends you to kill **Alpha-male Wolf** (CONs blue to white), in a cave (triggered spawn). Head back north, look for first cave to your right (east). Use invis or fight your way back. Kill, loot **Max's journal**, return to **Jack**.

3. **Jack** rewards you with a **belt of his design** and **70,000 XP**.

---

## 🟡 Quest 2: Freeport Side Quest
**Zone:** Freeport
**NPC:** Twindle Fizzmop

1. **Talk to Twindle**, merchant behind the blacksmith.

2. **Twindle** sends you to kill **Sacred Monarch** (CONs blue) in Mayfly Glade (not triggered spawn). Coach to Forkwatch (FW), head west to Mayfly Glade(W), find lighted glade with **statue of mayfly**. Kill, loot, return to **Twindle**.

3. **Twindle** wants **1600 tunar**. Rewards **Thulian Circlet**.

---

## 🔵 Quest 3: Black Swan Inn Side Quest
**Zone:** Jareds Blight
**NPC:** Finnus Sodwin

1. **Talk to Finnus**, near **Black Swan Inn** (near DM coach). From DM, follow road south, Inn is first building.

2. **Finnus** sends you to kill **Skarr** (CON yellow) in **Blackburrow dungeon**. From DM, follow road north to Gnoll Fort, then NE to dungeon entrance.

3. Enter dungeon, go to main chamber with massive hole. Small passage southwest leads to **Skarr**. Kill, loot, return to **Finnus**. ***NOTE: Shamans see through invis!***

4. **Finnus** rewards **1,084,993 XP** and **3000 tunar**.

---

## 🟣 Quest 4: Blakedown Side Quest
**Zone:** Blakedown
**NPC:** Argot Bittersteel

1. **Talk to Argot** in Blakedown. From DM, follow road south and west, first building (bar) on north side of road.

2. **Argot** sends you to find **tablet** and kill **Savage Bear** in **Al'Karad Ruins**. Follow north road out of town, road disappears briefly, continue north to ruins. Invisibility helps avoid undead.

3. Enter dungeon, head down straight back. Get **popup (tablet)**. If unvis, may need to kill mobs. Exit dungeon.

4. **Savage Bear** spawns NW or NE side of ruins. Kill, loot, return to **Argot**.

5. Rewards **789,086 XP** and **Medallion of Fortitude**.

---

## 🟠 Quest 5: Fort Seriak Side Quest
**Zone:** Fort Seriak
**NPC:** J'Lisa U'Dedne
> ⚠️ **Note:** Believed for **Evil Races only**.

1. **Talk to J'Lisa U'Dedne** in Fort Seriak. She sends you to RunnyEye to find **Quicktoe**.

2. From Highpass back door, head north over mountains, past first large hill, then west. Follow path to **RunnyEye**.

3. At citadel bridge, look for **'ichor worm'** (CON green). Jump down (invis). Three passages: go **west** (north=poxworm, east=back to citadel).

4. Encounter **'festerbug'** (CON green), message triggers. Goblin (CON dark blue) and **Jongo Quicktoe** (CON yellow) battling. Kill both. Loot **U'Dedne gem** (drops four).

5. Return to **J'Lisa U'Dedne** and receive **Hatesplint Jerkin**, **70,000 XP**, **+50 faction House of U'Dedne**, **+10 faction Indigo Brotherhood**.
